about.title: About Me
about.subtitle: Developer, writer, curious human.
about.bio1: Hi! I'm a software developer passionate about building things on the web. I write about technology, design systems, developer experience, and the occasional personal reflection.
about.bio2: This blog is built with Next.js, Tailwind CSS, and powered by Notion as a headless CMS. All articles are written and managed directly in Notion.
about.getInTouchText: Feel free to reach out via
about.bio: Passionate about coding, building weird but fun things, exploring everything when I can — on my way to becoming a full-stack developer.

aboutMe.title: Who Am I?
aboutMe.bio1: Hey! I'm Nguyen Van Sinh, aka ShinCode, a developer passionate about building modern web applications. I love creating products that are not only visually appealing but also performant and robust.
aboutMe.bio2: I'm currently honing my full-stack skills, with a goal of becoming a professional software engineer. Outside of coding, I enjoy writing blog posts, reading tech books, exploring new technologies, editor... I think so.
aboutMe.quote: Code is not just work — it's how I turn ideas into reality. I think 🤣!

items.description: Building custom web applications for clients, focusing on React and Next.js. Optimizing performance and user experience.
Contributing to feature development for an ERP system. Working with C# backend and React frontend, SQL Server, integrating third-party APIs.
Built a perpetual calendar software (task management, events, reminders,...) with Flutter, Next.js, Node.js and MySQL.

contact.title: Get In Touch
contact.subtitle: Got an interesting project? Want to collaborate? Or just want to say hello? — Send me a message!
contact.placeholderSubject: What would you like to talk about?
contact.successSubtitle: Thanks for reaching out. I'll get back to you as soon as possible.
